query:
SELECT repair_intelligence_json, cost_intelligence_json, causal_chain_json,
       causal_verdict_json, evidence_bundle_json, consensus_result_json,
       consistency_check_json, coherence_result_json, cost_realism_json,
       forensic_analysis, inferred_hidden_damages_json, pipeline_run_summary,
       parts_cost, labor_cost, estimated_parts_cost, estimated_labor_cost,
       accident_type, structural_damage, currency_code
FROM ai_assessments
WHERE id = 2100001;
